query:
SELECT st.id, st.token, st.room_id, st.property_id, st.room_number, st.status, st.expires_at,
       r.room_number as actual_room_number, r.id as actual_room_id
FROM peppr_stay_tokens st
LEFT JOIN peppr_rooms r ON st.room_id = r.id
WHERE st.property_id = '0b866ba8-2a18-4bc0-a'
ORDER BY st.token;
